description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline for a .NET library using a Windows runner. Define stages build, test, analyze. In the build stage add a build_job that restores NuGet packages with "& \"$env:NUGET_PATH\" restore \"$env:SOLUTION_PATH\"" then builds the solution with "& \"$env:MSBUILD_PATH\" \"$env:SOLUTION_PATH\" /p:Configuration=Release /clp:ErrorsOnly /t:Rebuild /m" and publishes the test output folder ($env:TEST_FOLDER) as an artifact that expires in 2 days. In the test stage add a test_job that depends on build_job and runs the NUnit console via "& \"$env:NUNIT_PATH\\nunit3-console.exe\" \"$env:TEST_FOLDER\\JustAnotherNetworkLib.Test.dll\"". In the analyze stage add an analyze_with_sonar_job that depends on build_job and runs SonarScanner begin with "& \"$env:SONAR_PATH\" begin /k:\"justanothernetworklib\" /d:sonar.organization=\"tollstudios\" /d:sonar.host.url=\"https://sonarcloud.io\" /d:sonar.login=\"$env:SonarCloud_Token\" /d:sonar.cs.vscoveragexml.reportsPaths=\".\\code.coveragexml\"", restores NuGet packages, rebuilds the solution, collects code coverage with "& \"$env:CODECOVERAGE_PATH\" collect /output:\".\\code.coverage\" \"$env:NUNIT_PATH\\nunit3-console.exe\" \"$env:TEST_FOLDER\\JustAnotherNetworkLib.Test.dll\"", analyzes coverage with "& \"$env:CODECOVERAGE_PATH\" analyze /output:\".\\code.coveragexml\" \".\\code.coverage\"", ends SonarScanner with "& \"$env:SONAR_PATH\" end /d:sonar.login=\"$env:SonarCloud_Token\"", and stops MSBuild processes with "Stop-Process -Name \"MSBuild\"". All jobs run only on branch pipelines and use the defined variables.
